## Environment

- OS and version:
- MATLAB version:
- Shell used for helper scripts:
- Fresh clone commit:

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `docs/first-use-test.md`.
- [ ] I ran the MATLAB quick start from a fresh clone.
- [ ] I tried `sftListTemplates()`.
- [ ] I tried `sftFindTemplates("matrix")` or another search term.
- [ ] I rendered a small template subset.
- [ ] I avoided private data, copied journal figures, and third-party plotting files.

## Result

```text
Command sequence:
Template subset rendered:
Output formats:
Quick start result:
Template discovery result:
Rendering result:
CLI/helper script result:
Expected result:
Actual result:
Private details redacted: yes/no
```

## Most Useful Template

Which existing template would you use first, and why?

## Most Confusing Part

What was unclear, slow, brittle, or surprising?

## Missing Template Or Workflow

What high-value template, export option, or workflow would make the project more
useful?

## Notes

Please keep feedback reproducible. Small command outputs or synthetic examples
are more useful than private datasets or copied source material.
